info.title: headhunter-api-hub
info.description: Headhunter API Hub — pure API server (no frontend). Designed for collaboration with AI agents and sibling projects (e.g. ow-headhunter-erp).

post.summary: 用户名+密码登录, 拿 JWT
post.description: 10 次 / 15 分钟 限流 (per IP). 返回 token + user. token 后续放 Authorization: Bearer <token>

get.summary: 候选人列表 (分页+筛选+FTS5 搜索)
get.description: 支持 keyword 全文搜索 (FTS5), status/city/source_channel/years/education/salary 多维筛选, includeDeleted (admin only) 查软删
